programme.title: Click
programme.desc: When a harried workaholic is given a universal remote that allows him to pause, rewind or skip past portions of his life, he discovers which parts are truly the best of his life.

programme.title: City Slickers II
programme.desc: Three urban adventurers return to the West and saddle up again, this time to search for hidden treasure.

programme.title: Pineapple Express
programme.desc: Process Server Dale Denton has a grudging business relationship with the laconic Saul Silver, deigning to visit only to purchase Saul's primo product, a rare new strain of pot called Pineapple Express. But when Dale becomes the only witness to a murder by a crooked cop and the city's most dangerous drug lord, he panics and dumps the Pineapple Express at the scene. When it's traced back to him, Dale and Saul run for their lives and they quickly discover that they're not just suffering from weed-fueled paranoia. If they survive, these two just might become real friends.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: A chimp follows Samantha home and is launched on an advertising career.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Upset by the rivalry between her grandmothers, Tabitha turns into a cookie.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: When Darrin joins an exclusive club, Endora turns him into a snob.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Refusing to obey the Witches' Council and give up Darrin, Samantha loses her magical powers.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Darrin stubbornly refuses a birthday gift and Maurice turns him into a mule.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Samantha's good news stops her parents' quarrel - for a moment.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Cousin Henry turns on all his pranks when he goes shopping with Samantha.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: After offending Endora, Darrin disappears whenever he sparks Spanish.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.sub-title: Samantha And Darrin In Mexico City
programme.desc: After offending Endora, Darrin disappears whenever he sparks Spanish.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Tabitha brings the story of JACK AND THE BEANSTALK to life.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Endora brings a witch with fading powers to be Samantha's maid,
When Pearl finds out that Calvin is failing his history class, Mary, Rose and Lester each take turns as tutor-in-residence.

Though Brenda's but a week away from her sixteenth birthday, a milestone marking newfound dating freedom, Mary refuses to bend the rules and allow her to accept Calvin's invitation to the party of the year.
When Brenda's grandfather gives her his treasured collector's blues recording, she accidentally scratches the record and learns first-hand what the blues are all about.
When Mary and Lester assume the role of temporary foster parents, they're horrified to find Sandra's erotic lifestyle rubbing off on the impressionable co-ed.
When Mary's best high school chum, a successful television psychologist, pays her a visit, Mary feels somewhat inadequate when compared with her celebrity friend.
The tenants are thrilled when Rose hires a live-in handyman for some much needed repairs, only to find he's handier with the violin than the toolbox.
Mary has a terrible time trying to be polite to Fox, who is rude and obnoxious yet potentially important to Lester's financial future.
When Mary and Rose win the services of a butler in the church raffle, they look forward to the pampered life until they meet the pain-in-the-neck hired help.
Mary may be faced with eviction when 227's stingy landlord dies, and her nemesis Sandra is in line to inherit the building.

programme.sub-title: A Daughter Is A Precious Thing
programme.desc: When Mary can't solve daughter Brenda's boy problems, Brenda enlists the aid of an expert -- Mary's nemesis, Sandra, their sultry, sexy and "man-wise" neighbor.

Young Calvin's unemployment has gotten everyone at "227" so concerned that "always-involved" Mary badgers husband Lester into hiring him--but when Lester is forced to fire the awkward teenager, the residents explode.

After Mary's refrigerator breaks down, her sly and opportunistic neighbor Sandra readily agrees to use her "influence" on their stingy landlord to get her a new one--in exchange for Mary lending her apartment to Sandra for one of her "small gatherings."

Mary Jenkins (series star Marla Gibbs), the irrepressible meddler and protector of "227," an aging apartment building, gives honesty a beating after she backs into a neighbor's parked car and then calls upon her "man-wise" nemesis Sandra (Jackée) to use her feminine wiles to calm the handsome man's anger. Mary's problems are further fueled when the unwitting owner's car is destroyed by a hit and run driver, leaving Mary's apology note the only recognizable feature on the expensive vehicle. This forces her to reluctantly press her luck by asking the crafty Sandra to lure the man's attentions away from pressing charges of his own.
Mary fires Cupid's arrow at her brother Lewis and best friend Rose, but she misses the mark when Lewis sets his own sights on resident vamp Sandra.
Brenda's genealogy assignment triggers a war between her mother Mary and neighbor Sandra over famous ancestors--but Mary's pride soon goes AWOL when she learns her family tree has root rot.

Both Mary and Sandra get a different view of womanhood when housewife Mary attempts to rekindle lost love by "steppin' out" with husband Lester, while party-happy Sandra is homebound with her six-year-old niece for the weekend.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: Kelly becomes a prima donna after being asked to fill in on a popular children's television program.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.sub-title: Breaking Up Is Easy To Do (Part I)
programme.desc: A party game sends Al and Peggy to a marriage counselor; Kelly squares off in the boxing ring against a rival actress.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.sub-title: Breaking Up Is Easy To Do (Part II)
programme.desc: When Al moves out, he and Peggy throw themselves into the singles scene, with widely different results.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.sub-title: Breaking Up Is Easy To Do (Part III)
programme.desc: While Al finds single life dismal, Peggy tries to land a new husband.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: As Jefferson's worries about getting old force him into taking a job, Al tries to cure Peggy's shopping addiction.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: Al sells his soul for a chance to play in the Super Bowl.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: Al and Griff trade the shoe store's inventory for a massage chair.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: Al strikes up a friendship with Marcy's identical cousin.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: Bud's prison pen pal arrives to rob the Bundys.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: Al objects to Kelly marrying an armed robber, until he discovers that he's the heir to a family fortune.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: Peggy forces Al to sacrifice a basketball game and spend a torturous evening in conversation with new neighbors, idealistic newlyweds Steve and Marcy Rhoades.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: At the suggestion of her next-door-neighbor Marcy, Peggy goes on a "thinergy" diet in hopes of rekindling the flame in Al.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.sub-title: Sixteen Years And What Do You Get?
programme.desc: Unbeknownst to Al, Peggy runs his credit card up to the limit and Al is forced to show up for his sixteenth wedding anniversary empty-handed.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.sub-title: But I Didn't Shoot The Deputy
programme.desc: Like any red-blooded American, when Al hears a strange sound in the night, he springs to the defense of his home and family and accidentally shoots the neighbor's dog.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.sub-title: Have You Driven A Ford Lately?
programme.desc: After Al and Steve restore a '65 Mustang to its former glory, Marcy and Steve can't resist giving it a test run - from the back seat.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: When Steve and Marcy decide to add on to their house, Al and Peggy have them squabbling over an exercise salon for the girls or a poolroom for the guys.

programme.title: Rambo (2008)
programme.desc: Twenty years have passed and John Rambo has retreated to northern Thailand. When a group of human rights missionaries fall into the hands of the Burmese army he sets aside his reluctance for violence and conflict and the Vietnam lethal super soldier re-emerges.

programme.title: Ultraviolet (2006)
programme.desc: Set in the late 21st century, a subculture of humans called Hemophages has emerged who have been genetically modified, giving them enhanced speed, incredible stamina and acute intelligence. To the government's dismay, more and more of the population are being transformed, and they have set out to rid the world of this new subculture that they deem a menace to society. One rogue warrior is bent on protecting her race - and seeking revenge on those who changed her life forever. With fierce fighting skills and chameleon-like abilities, Violet sets out to destroy a government-designed time bomb that will eliminate all Hemophages.

programme.title: Stealth
programme.desc: Deeply ensconced in a top-secret military program, three pilots struggle to bring an artificial intelligence program under control ... before it initiates the next world war.

programme.title: Hellboy
programme.desc: A demon, raised from infancy after being conjured by and rescued from the Nazis, grows up to become a defender against the forces of darkness.

programme.title: Blue Streak
programme.desc: Miles Logan (Martin Lawrence) is a talented jewel thief who has stolen $20 million dollars worth of diamonds and has hidden them at a construction site before being captured. Now, after three years in jail, he returns to pick up the diamonds only to find that the site is now a police precinct.

programme.title: Takers (2010)
programme.desc: Matt Dillon, Idris Elba, Paul Walker and Hayden Christiansen star in this action-packed thriller full of twists and turns.

programme.title: Angel Eyes
programme.desc: After meeting under extraordinary life-and-death circumstances, a Chicago police officer (Lopez) and a lost soul named Catch (Caviezel) fall in love. While uncovering the truth about Catch, she is forced to deal with the secrets of her own past.

programme.title: Alpha (2018)
programme.desc: Alpha is an epic adventure set in the last Ice Age. While on his first hunt with his tribe's most elite group, a young man is injured and left for dead. Awakening to find himself broken and alone, he must learn to survive and navigate the harsh and unforgiving wilderness.

programme.title: Battle: Los Angeles
programme.desc: A platoon of Marines battles an alien invasion on the streets of Los Angeles.

programme.title: Resident Evil: Extinction
programme.desc: Milla Jovovich is back to kill more zombies in the third chapter of the hit Resident Evil franchise! An action/horror film filled with huge special effects and edge-of-your-seat terror! Survivors of the Raccoon City catastrophe travel across the Nevada desert, hoping to make it to Alaska. Alice (Jovovich) joins the caravan and their fight against the evil Umbrella Corp.

programme.title: Never Back Down: No Surrender
programme.desc: Former MMA superstar agrees to train a fighter for the match of a lifetime in Thailand.

programme.title: Black and Blue (2019)
programme.desc: After capturing crooked cops killing drug dealers on her body cam, a female rookie must evade the narcotics officers who are after the incriminating evidence.

programme.title: Money Monster
programme.desc: Lee Gates, a bombastic television stock huckster, is taken hostage on his TV show by an outraged gunman. As much of the world watches live, Gates must keep himself alive and, with help from the woman who produces the show, uncover the truth behind a tangle of big money lies.

programme.title: Salt
programme.desc: Angelina Jolie stars in Columbia Pictures' Salt, a contemporary espionage thriller. Before becoming a CIA officer, Evelyn Salt (Jolie) swore an oath to duty, honor, and country. She will prove loyal to these when a defector accuses her of being a Russian sleeper spy. Salt goes on the run, using all her skills and years of experience as a covert operative to elude capture, protect her husband, and stay one step ahead of her colleagues at the CIA.

programme.title: The Dark Tower (2017)
programme.desc: Roland & the Man in Black share an ancient vendetta, they must fight to the death in an epic battle over the fate of the Universe.

programme.title: Baby Driver
programme.desc: Coerced into working for a crime boss, a young getaway driver must face the music when a doomed heist threatens his life, love & freedom.

programme.title: I Still Know What You Did Last Summer
programme.desc: Haunted by the brutal murders of her friends, Julie James is struggling to lead a normal life as a college freshman in Boston.

programme.desc: Twenty years have passed and John Rambo has retreated to northern Thailand. When a group of human rights missionaries fall into the hands of the Burmese army he sets aside his reluctance for violence and conflict and the Vietnam lethal super soldier re-emerges.

programme.title: The Art Of War
programme.desc: Shaw is an operative for the United Nations' covert dirty-tricks squad, using espionage and quasi-ethical tactics to secure peace and cooperation. When a shipping container full of dead Vietnamese refugees turns up on the docks and China's ambassador is gunned down at a dinner celebrating a new trade agreement with China and the US, Shaw is framed for the murder and must evade the FBI and Triad gangsters to find out what is really going on.

Never before has a date in history been so significant to so many cultures, so many religions, scientists, and governments. 2012 is an epic adventure about a global cataclysm that brings an end to the world and tells of the heroic struggle of the survivors.

programme.title: The Mask of Zorro
programme.desc: A sweeping tale of love and honor, tragedy and triumph set against the Spanish conquest of Mexico, THE MASK OF ZORRO stars Anthony Hopkins and Antonio Banderas. After twenty years as the legendary Zorro, Don Diego (Hopkins) must transform a troubled drifter (Banderas) into the fearless hero he oncewas.

programme.title: Better Call Saul
programme.desc: Jimmy's business enters uncharted territory. Kim's confidence is tested when she's faced with a legal problem only she can solve. Nacho navigates increased pressure from Gus. Mike continues to spiral.

programme.title: Better Call Saul
programme.desc: As Jimmy doubles down on “Saul Goodman,” a deeply conflicted Kim brings him an interesting proposition. Gus makes a sacrifice in order to play the long game. Mike attempts to smooth things over with his family.

programme.title: Better Call Saul
programme.desc: Mike takes an impromptu trip. As she and Jimmy grow closer over their campaign to help a client, Kim makes a surprising call.

programme.desc: Kim tries to pump the brakes on Jimmy's latest scheme, but it may be too late to stop Saul; Mike turns the heat up on Lalo; Nacho attempts to enlist support from above.

programme.title: Better Call Saul
programme.desc: Jimmy and Kim build a legal firewall with help from Huell; Kim sets things straight with her clients as Jimmy is compromised by his; Gus calms troubled waters in service of his plot to build an empire; Mike does damage control.

programme.title: Alex Rider
programme.desc: Following his uncle’s mysterious death, Alex Rider begins a quest for answers that leads him into a dark world of secrets and espionage. He comes to realise that his uncle wasn’t the man he thought he was – and that Alex himself is expected to follow in his footsteps.

programme.title: Alex Rider
programme.desc: Still reeling from the revelation that his uncle was a spy for the British Government, Alex is kidnapped and interrogated by an unknown group of paramilitary agents. It will take all his hidden skills to turn the tables on his captors.

programme.title: Alex Rider
programme.desc: Alex is thrown into the unfamiliar world of the ultra-rich as he struggles to perfect his cover identity, but risks alienating his best friend Tom by keeping the mission a secret.

programme.title: Game Night
programme.desc: Max and Annie's weekly game night gets kicked up a notch when Max's brother Brooks arranges a murder mystery party -- complete with fake thugs and federal agents. So when Brooks gets kidnapped, it's all supposed to be part of the game. As the competitors set out to solve the case, they start to learn that neither the game nor Brooks are what they seem to be. The friends soon find themselves in over their heads as each twist leads to another unexpected turn over the course of one chaotic night.

programme.title: The Spectacular Now
programme.desc: High school senior Sutter Keely is an effortless charmer and self-proclaimed life of the party who unexpectedly falls in love with the nice girl Aimee Fineky. While Aimee dreams of the future, Sutter lives in the now. And yet somehow, they're drawn together. What starts as an unlikely romance becomes a sharp-eyed, straight-up snapshot of the heady confusion and haunting passion of youth -- one that doesn't look for tidy truths.

programme.title: A Good Day to Die Hard
programme.desc: New York City cop John McClane (Bruce Willis) arrives in Moscow to track down his estranged son, Jack (Jai Courtney). McClane thinks his son is a criminal, so it comes as a shock when he learns that Jack is actually working undercover to protect Komarov (Sebastian Koch), a Russian government whistleblower. With their own lives on the line, McClane and Jack must overcome their differences in order to get Komarov to safety and thwart a potentially disastrous crime in the Chernobyl region.

programme.title: The Witch
programme.desc: In 1630 New England, panic and despair envelops a farmer, his wife and their children when youngest son Samuel suddenly vanishes. The family blames Thomasin, the oldest daughter who was watching the boy at the time of his disappearance. With suspicion and paranoia mounting, twin siblings Mercy and Jonas suspect Thomasin of witchcraft, testing the clan's faith, loyalty and love to one another.

programme.title: Life of Pi
programme.desc: After deciding to sell their zoo in India and move to Canada, Santosh and Gita Patel board a freighter with their sons and a few remaining animals. Tragedy strikes when a terrible storm sinks the ship, leaving the Patels' teenage son, Pi, as the only human survivor. However, Pi is not alone; a fearsome Bengal tiger has also found refuge aboard the lifeboat. As days turn into weeks and weeks drag into months, Pi and the tiger must learn to trust each other if both are to survive.

programme.desc: Eric Noone begins a forbidden romance with Rose Davenport, the lady of the house at a posh English manor. When an unexpected murder occurs, Eric gets framed, leaving Rose and her family's future uncertain.

programme.title: John Wick
programme.desc: Legendary assassin John Wick (Keanu Reeves) retired from his violent career after marrying the love of his life. Her sudden death leaves John in deep mourning. When sadistic mobster Iosef Tarasov (Alfie Allen) and his thugs steal John's prized car and kill the puppy that was a last gift from his wife, John unleashes the remorseless killing machine within and seeks vengeance. Meanwhile, Iosef's father (Michael Nyqvist) -- John's former colleague -- puts a huge bounty on John's head.

programme.title: John Wick: Chapter 4
programme.desc: With the price on his head ever-increasing, legendary hit man John Wick takes his fight against the High Table global as he seeks out the most powerful players in the underworld, from New York to Paris to Japan to Berlin.

programme.title: From the World of John Wick: Ballerina
programme.desc: Trained in the assassin traditions of the Ruska Roma, Eve Macarro takes on an army of killers as she seeks revenge against those responsible for the death of her father.

programme.title: My Blind Brother
programme.desc: Bill has always lived in the shadow of his overachieving brother Robbie, an arrogant athlete and local celebrity who happens to be blind. After years of thanklessly helping Robbie achieve one goal after another, Bill finally catches a break when he finds a connection with the charming Rose, who is dealing with her own crisis. But when Rose starts dating Robbie, Bill must decide if he can finally put his own happiness over his brother's and compete for the ultimate prize.

programme.title: Half Man
programme.desc: 2014; Niall builds a new life, but old ties resurface when Mona reconnects with Ruben, forcing difficult choices.

programme.title: Twilight
programme.desc: High-school student Bella Swan, always a bit of a misfit, doesn't expect life to change much when she moves from sunny Arizona to rainy Washington state. Then she meets Edward Cullen, a handsome but mysterious teen whose eyes seem to peer directly into her soul. Edward is a vampire whose family does not drink blood, and Bella, far from being frightened, enters into a dangerous romance with her immortal soulmate.

programme.title: The Twilight Saga: New Moon
programme.desc: After the abrupt departure of Edward, her vampire love, Bella finds comfort in her deepening friendship with Jacob Black. However, Bella's loyalties are put to the test as she becomes drawn into the world of werewolves, ancient enemies of vampires.

programme.title: The Twilight Saga: Eclipse
programme.desc: Danger once again surrounds Bella, as a string of mysterious killings terrorizes Seattle and a malicious vampire continues her infernal quest for revenge. Amid the tumult, Bella must choose between her love for Edward and her friendship with Jacob, knowing that her decision may ignite the long-simmering feud between vampire and werewolf.

programme.title: The Twilight Saga: Breaking Dawn Part 1
programme.desc: At last, Bella and Edward are getting married. When Jacob finds out that Bella wants to spend her honeymoon as a human, he is horrified, for Edward's passion could accidentally kill her. Bella does indeed survive her honeymoon, but a new complication arises when she discovers that she's pregnant, and the child is growing at an alarming rate. The pregnancy sets the wolves against Bella and Edward, but Jacob vows to protect his friend.

programme.title: The Twilight Saga: Breaking Dawn Part 2
programme.desc: Bella awakes, as a vampire, from her life-threatening labor, and her newborn daughter, Renesmee, proves to be very special indeed. While Bella adjusts to her new state of being, Renesmee experiences accelerated growth. When the Volturi learn of the baby's existence, they declare her to be an abomination and sentence the Cullens to death. Bella, Edward and the rest of the clan seek help from allies around the world to protect their family.

programme.title: US Against the World: Four Years with the Men's National Soccer Team

programme.title: An Update on Our Family
programme.desc: Chronicles the lucrative world of YouTube vlogging, including social media archival footage of Myka and James Stauffer; Hannah Cho, an avid YouTube consumer, explains how daily videos and constant updates provide a sense of community.

programme.title: An Update on Our Family
programme.desc: The business of family vlogging is explored; as adoption day approaches, the Stauffers post videos counting down the days.

programme.title: An Update on Our Family
programme.desc: Concerned fans turn to critics; commentators shed light on the Stauffers' catalogue of content, dissecting their lavish lifestyle and their adopted son's treatment; an update from the family results in brands dropping their sponsorship.

programme.title: Mortal Kombat
programme.desc: Hunted by the fearsome warrior Sub-Zero, MMA fighter Cole Young finds sanctuary at the temple of Lord Raiden. Training with experienced fighters Liu Kang, Kung Lao and the rogue mercenary Kano, Cole prepares to stand with Earth's greatest champions to take on the enemies from Outworld in a high-stakes battle for the universe.

programme.title: Mortal Kombat Annihilation
programme.desc: Every generation, a portal opens up between the Outerworld and Earth. Emperor Shao Kahn (Brian Thompson), ruler of the mythical Outerworld, pounces the moment the portal reopens and slips through with his mighty warriors, intent on total domination and uniting the two worlds. However, he has only seven days to complete his task. In the meantime, opposition grows and warriors Sonya Blade (Sandra Hess), Jax (Lynn "Red" Williams), Kitana (Talisa Soto) and Liu Kang (Robin Shou) get ready for war.

programme.title: Mortal Kombat
programme.desc: Hunted by the fearsome warrior Sub-Zero, MMA fighter Cole Young finds sanctuary at the temple of Lord Raiden. Training with experienced fighters Liu Kang, Kung Lao and the rogue mercenary Kano, Cole prepares to stand with Earth's greatest champions to take on the enemies from Outworld in a high-stakes battle for the universe.

programme.title: The Batman
programme.desc: Batman ventures into Gotham City's underworld when a sadistic killer leaves behind a trail of cryptic clues. As the scale of the perpetrator's plans become clear, he must bring justice to the abuse of power and corruption that plagues the metropolis.

programme.title: Superman: The Movie
programme.desc: Just before the destruction of the planet Krypton, scientist Jor-El (Marlon Brando) sends his infant son Kal-El on a spaceship to Earth. Raised by kindly farmers Jonathan (Glenn Ford) and Martha Kent (Phyllis Thaxter), young Clark (Christopher Reeve) discovers the source of his superhuman powers and moves to Metropolis to fight evil. As Superman, he battles the villainous Lex Luthor (Gene Hackman), while, as novice reporter Clark Kent, he attempts to woo co-worker Lois Lane (Margot Kidder).

programme.title: Superman II
programme.desc: Superman (Christopher Reeve) foils the plot of terrorists by hurtling their nuclear device into outer space, but the bomb's shock waves free the Kryptonian villain General Zod (Terence Stamp) and his henchmen Ursa (Sarah Douglas) and Non (Jack O'Halloran) from their imprisonment. Traveling to Earth, they threaten the planet with destruction at the same time that Superman decides to renounce his superpowers in order to live a normal life as Clark Kent with his new love, Lois Lane (Margot Kidder).

programme.title: Fackham Hall
programme.desc: Eric Noone begins a forbidden romance with Rose Davenport, the lady of the house at a posh English manor. When an unexpected murder occurs, Eric gets framed, leaving Rose and her family's future uncertain.

programme.title: MacGruber
programme.desc: In the decade since his fiancée was killed, an Army Ranger, Green Beret and Navy SEAL rolled into one has sworn off fighting crime, preferring instead to rock his mullet as a man of peace. But when his sworn enemy, Dieter Von Cunth, steals a nuclear warhead, only MacGruber and his crack team of experts are equal to the task of bringing the villain to justice.

programme.title: Get Him to the Greek
programme.desc: An ambitious executive at a record company, Aaron Green (Jonah Hill) gets what looks like an easy assignment: He must escort British rock legend Aldous Snow (Russell Brand) to L.A.'s Greek Theatre for the first stop on a lucrative comeback-concert tour. Snow, however, has different plans. Learning his true love is in California, the rocker vows to win her back before starting the tour, forcing Aaron to pull out all the stops to get Snow on stage in time.

programme.title: Zola
programme.desc: Zola, a Detroit waitress, is seduced into a weekend of stripping in Florida for some quick cash -- but the trip becomes a sleepless 48-hour odyssey involving a nefarious friend, her pimp and her idiot boyfriend.

programme.title: My Blind Brother
programme.desc: Bill has always lived in the shadow of his overachieving brother Robbie, an arrogant athlete and local celebrity who happens to be blind. After years of thanklessly helping Robbie achieve one goal after another, Bill finally catches a break when he finds a connection with the charming Rose, who is dealing with her own crisis. But when Rose starts dating Robbie, Bill must decide if he can finally put his own happiness over his brother's and compete for the ultimate prize.

programme.title: Martin Lawrence: You So Crazy
programme.desc: Filmed at a sold-out Majestic Theater in Brooklyn, N.Y., comedian Martin Lawrence delivers his first full-length stand-up special. Harking back to Eddie Murphy, the leather-clad comic riffs on drugs, jail, his impoverished upbringing with his mother and his luck -- or lack thereof -- with women. He also speaks at length about racism and the Rodney King ruling and subsequent riots. Lawrence even offers his unique perspective on how to maintain a successful relationship.

programme.title: Dr. Seuss' The Cat in the Hat
programme.desc: In this live-action film based on the favorite children's tale, the trouble-making Cat in the Hat (Mike Myers) arrives at the home of bored young Sally Walden (Dakota Fanning) and her brother, Conrad (Spencer Breslin), while their mother (Kelly Preston) is out. The family's pet fish (Sean Hayes) objects to the Cat's presence, but that doesn't stop the hat-wearing giant feline from trying to have fun, no matter how much destruction is left in his wake.

programme.title: Flow
programme.desc: Cat is a solitary animal, but as its home is devastated by a great flood, he finds refuge on a boat populated by various species, and will have to team up with them despite their differences.

programme.title: Any One of Us
programme.desc: An unprecedented glimpse into the world of spinal cord injuries.

programme.title: I Can Be President: A Kid's-Eye View
programme.desc: Children's ideas about the presidency.

programme.title: Miss You Can Do It
programme.desc: Abbey Curran, the first woman with cerebral palsy to compete in a Miss USA Pageant, creates a pageant specifically for girls with special needs.

programme.title: The Devil Wears Prada
programme.desc: Andy is a recent college graduate with big dreams. Upon landing a job at prestigious Runway magazine, she finds herself the assistant to diabolical editor Miranda Priestly. Andy questions her ability to survive her grim tour as Miranda's whipping girl without getting scorched.

programme.title: Boys Go to Jupiter
programme.desc: Billy 5000, a teenage gig worker with a rise-and-grind mindset, aims to make $5,000. His quest is derailed by a gelatinous alien's appearance.

programme.title: Beetlejuice Beetlejuice
programme.desc: Still haunted by Beetlejuice, Lydia's life gets turned upside down when her daughter discovers a portal to the afterlife. When someone says Beetlejuice's name three times, the mischievous demon returns to unleash his very own brand of mayhem.

programme.title: This Is Spinal Tap
programme.desc: "This Is Spinal Tap" shines a light on the self-contained universe of a metal band struggling to get back on the charts, including everything from its complicated history of ups and downs, gold albums, name changes and undersold concert dates, along with the full host of requisite groupies, promoters, hangers-on and historians, sessions, release events and those special behind-the-scenes moments that keep it all real.

programme.title: Spinal Tap II: The End Continues
programme.desc: Documentarian Marty DiBergi follows estranged Spinal Tap bandmates David St. Hubbins, Nigel Tufnel and Derek Smalls as they search for a drummer and prepare for a reunion concert in New Orleans. Joined by music royalty Paul McCartney and Elton John, Spinal Tap wrestles with their checkered past to put on a show they hope will solidify their place in the pantheon of rock 'n' roll.

programme.title: The Moment
programme.desc: As her arena tour debut looms, a pop star finds herself caught inside the afterglow of a breakout summer under the mounting pressure of what it costs to stay on top.

programme.title: Flight Risk
programme.desc: A U.S. marshal boards a small plane to transfer a government witness to New York. As they cross the Alaskan wilderness, tensions start to rise as not everyone on the flight is who they appear to be.

programme.title: Everything Everywhere All at Once
programme.desc: When an interdimensional rupture unravels reality, an unlikely hero must channel her newfound powers to fight bizarre and bewildering dangers from the multiverse.

programme.title: The Mummy
programme.desc: Nick Morton is a soldier of fortune who plunders ancient sites for timeless artifacts and sells them to the highest bidder. When Nick and his partner come under attack in the Middle East, the ensuing battle accidentally unearths Ahmanet, a betrayed Egyptian princess who was entombed under the desert for thousands of years. With her powers constantly evolving, Morton must now stop the resurrected monster as she embarks on a furious rampage through the streets of London.

programme.title: Lola Versus
programme.desc: Just three weeks before her wedding, Lola (Greta Gerwig) finds herself suddenly without a partner when her longtime fiancé, Luke (Joel Kinnaman), dumps her. With her 30th birthday looming and being forced to re-enter the New York City dating scene, she feels adrift in a cold world. She leans on her friends (Zoe Lister-Jones, Hamish Linklater) for support but, after a series of romantic humiliations, professional blunders and boozy antics, Lola realizes that she alone is in charge of her fate.
A time traveler risks his life to change the course of history and save the future of humanity.

programme.title: Dune

As malevolent forces explode into conflict over the planet's exclusive supply of a precious resource in existence, only those who can conquer their own fear will survive.

programme.title: Dune: Part Two

While there, she reminisces with friends and fans and begins a whirlwind romance with musician Mickey Deans, her soon-to-be fifth husband.

programme.title: Three Billboards Outside Ebbing, Missouri

When his second-in-command, Officer Dixon -- an immature mother's boy with a penchant for violence -- gets involved, the battle is only exacerbated.

Aimee accompanies her dad Wayne to a PIP (Personal Independence Payment) assessment, but the system's cold bureaucracy pushes him to an emotional breaking point and the pair struggle with the financial and emotional difficulties of living with his disability - meanwhile, the boys at school prepare for the best Mischief Night ever as Reece wants revenge on a bus driver who he blames for sabotaging his football career - but Connor finds himself torn between his budding romance with fellow car enthusiast Lauren and his loyalty to the group - Aimee tries to support her dad financially and ventures into using an OnlyFans-like platform that sparks a heated debate about feminism, independence and the 'acceptable' way for girls to make money when her secret is exposed in the classroom, and Mia-Louise plays a prank on her online gaming friend James as their flirtation continues.

programme.title: G'wed
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series providing an honest, uplifting and heart-warming portrayal of teenagers from Liverpool. The countdown for the legendary party Scousechella is on and the whole school scrambles to get tickets, Christopher struggles with the anniversary of his mother's passing away as a misunderstanding about the next steps in his relationship with Aimee threatens their bond, and Reece wrestles with feelings of irrelevance given that both Connor and his mum seem to be moving on without him. Scousechella itself lives up to its hype and wild reputation, but things take a turn back at the school when a mysterious hacker named Ye Ma leaks footage from the party and reveals uncomfortable truths about relationships and consent - involving Reece, Aimee, Connor and Lauren - that leaves friendships and reputations hanging by a thread.

programme.title: G'wed
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series providing an honest, uplifting and heart-warming portrayal of teenagers from Liverpool. Mia-Louise heads to a gaming expo where she unexpectedly comes face to face with her online partner James and the gap in age between them is finally revealed, and Connor finds himself at the centre of a school scandal when he is accused of sexually assaulting Lauren at Scousechella - meanwhile, Lauren struggles to reclaim her voice about what happened while everyone else showcases theirs, and especially in the case of The Brimble who escalates the drama and tensions with a podcast on consent. After Lauren finally confronts Connor and reveals truths about their relationship that clarify events at the party, the pair find closure and a friendship moving forward - elsewhere, Christopher struggles with jealousy over Aimee and Reece's kiss at the party and is offered support by Jodie, and Mia-Louise's relationship with James takes a turn when she makes an impulsive visit to his flat.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: DCI John Barnaby takes on another case as the head of Causton CID. A social services investigator calls on elderly eccentrics William Bingham and his wife Mary but is sent away rudely by their daughter Selina and her husband Eddie Stanton - the Binghams live as recluses in upper-class squalor while the nearby Stantons run a stud farm with Ben Viviani, who is in love with Eddie's daughter Verity. Ben's mother Maggie had also humiliated the investigator - when his body is found in a river, they therefore all come under suspicion. Barnaby meets the Binghams and learns that they never recovered from losing their elder daughter and son in a drowning accident - passions are then aroused as Selina forces Ben to take her to bed before slashing Maggie's paintings with a knife. Mary later invites Barnaby to tea, but he discovers before he arrives that her daughter's body was never found - and then Mary is found dead. Could a mysterious reference to a moon crater called Bingham hold a clue?

programme.desc: Nostalgic police drama series set in a Yorkshire village in the 1960s. programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby decides to join a trip from Midsomer Parva to Brighton because he is suspicious about a deal to buy coastal land for holiday chalets by Causton's mayor Dave Hicks - he discovers that the land wanted by Hicks is prone to flooding from the sea. Also against the proposal is Lady Matilda William, a descendant of a French knight Sir Richard Guillaume, whose son Richard will be the last of the line because of brain damage sustained in an attack 20 years ago - in Brighton, some of the villagers go to the funfair. When Dalgleish takes a ride on the ghost train, he emerges from the tunnel beheaded - Barnaby learns about a proposal to build flood defences which would make Hicks' land rocket in value and that Dalgleish lent Hicks money to bribe councillors to agree. Back in Midsomer, Barnaby realises there could be a connection between Dalgleish's greedy desire for land and Lady Matilda's desire to preserve the Guillaume family line... but who is prepared to kill to protect Richard?

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: Lewis again comes out of retirement to help newly-promoted DI Hathaway and his assistant DS Lizzie Maddox as the team's abilities are sorely tested by the brutal murder of American classics student Rose Anderson, whose body is hauled from a canal with stab wounds to the neck and abdomen - initial suspicion falls on the wife of astrophysics professor Felix Garwood, who had recently broken off an affair with Rose and is married to Rose's PhD supervisor. Could the jealous wife have committed murder?

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: The third run of the female-led crime drama series continues. Dorothy is not impressed as Rachel hides out at Janet's, and even Rachel knows deep down that she will have to face her husband soon. The disturbing story of Joe Bevan continues to unfold as the body count rises and the team faces the task of identifying the victims. Joe's daughter Helen faces a tough time as the press interest mounts and she begins to realise the true extent of her father's horrific actions.

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: DCs Janet Scott and Rachel Bailey tackle some of the most extreme crimes imaginable while also dealing with their own personal struggles. Rachel's self-destructive behaviour begins to have an effect on Janet's daughter Taisie. Janet, meanwhile, is mortified when Gill berates her for inappropriate behaviour towards young sergeant Rob. The duo investigate the death of a care home resident whose daughter complains about the level of care he was receiving. Will they find any evidence of foul play?

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: 23-year-old Dianne Price is found drowned in her bath, wrapped in net curtains, and made to look like a bride with a ring on her finger, a bouquet of cheap flowers on a toilet seat, and a chilling message written in lipstick on the bathroom mirror - Barnaby and Jones begin their investigation and find no shortage of possible culprits. While Barnaby ponders the similarity of the case to a string of murders from 1912, Jones struggles with his new boss's love of psychology - the case then leads the detectives to a donkey sanctuary and a pub run by an ex-copper and former madam. When local vet Fran Carter is murdered at a heritage steam railway site - and her body decorated with confetti - Barnaby finds parallels with another decades-old case... could history be repeating itself? It is not long before there are more shocking deaths, and Barnaby and Jones must work fast if they are to catch the killer before it is too late.

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: Drama based on the novel by Ann Cleeves. After news breaks that Jeanine Long has taken her own life, evidence comes to light exonerating her for the murder of 15-year-old Abigail Mantel 11 years earlier. Jeanie had always insisted on her innocence but no-one - including her own family - believed her. Vera sets out to solve the mystery of Abigail's death, and she and her team delve into the secrets and lies of a small community which is still feeling the repercussions of the killing. Vera digs away at the evidence in her efforts to get closer to the truth, but not before the case takes a violent and unexpected turn when another, potentially connected, murder occurs. With a killer on the loose and the pressure building, Vera must use her skill and instinct to expose the lies at the community's heart - and to lay the ghosts of Abigail and Jeanie to rest.

programme.title: Scott & Bailey

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: Police drama series. Battle-scarred from their conflict during the last series, Rachel and Janet are determined to move forward. Scott and Bailey find themselves in front of the promotions board being interviewed for the post of sergeant; when both pass with flying colours, DCI Gill Murray has to choose which of them gets the job at Syndicate Nine. Meanwhile, the team's latest case involves the abduction and possible murder of vulnerable young man Robin McKendrick. When a photo of Robin gagged and bound in the boot of a car appears on Facebook, Syndicate Nine suspect that he is already dead. A lead takes the team to a local quarry where they expect to find Robin's remains, but when the divers are called in, the body they find is that of a young woman...

programme.title: Midsomer Murders

At the local pub, Barnaby hears various conspiracy theories about how the Lamberts met their death - their lawyer reveals that her clients withdrew thousands of pounds from their account supposedly for gambling and also gave them advice about the use of a promissory note. While Barnaby tries to find out who might have borrowed money from the Lamberts, another cult member dies suspiciously - the police uncover existence of a promissory note and discover that the man who witnessed it died the same night as the Lamberts. Can Barnaby and Jones find out who killed the owners of Malham Hall and if the case has a link to the missing woman?

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: Drama series exploring the personal and professional lives of two female detectives in Manchester. After promising that the chaos of her personal life was behind her, Rachel is torn when she discovers that her mother's new boyfriend is a violent domestic abuser. Meanwhile, Janet goes on her first date but gets cold feet at the last minute when the idea of having to sell herself to a stranger makes her heart sink. At work, the murder of a gay man has all the markings of a hate crime, but why is his friend struggling to answer some simple questions?

programme.title: Robson and Jim's Fly Fishing Adventure
programme.desc: Actors and best friends Robson Green and Jim Murray hit the road again in search of big fish on another incredible fly-fishing adventure. In this episode, Robson and Jim are in Scotland - they first try the River Deveron before heading to the most famous river of them all: the Spey.

programme.title: Robson and Jim's Fly Fishing Adventure
programme.desc: Actors and best friends Robson Green and Jim Murray continue their search for big fish on another incredible fly-fishing adventure. In this episode, Robson and Jim pull out all of the stops looking for bars of silver as they travel from source to sea on Robson's home river of the Tyne.

programme.desc: Classic US action drama series. An eccentric client hires Thomas to participate in a crime drama based on situations derived from the works of acclaimed author Dashiell Hammett.

programme.title: Boon
programme.desc: Classic drama starring Michael Elphick. Rocky is in love again - this time with the daughter of the owner of Pizza Palace - and Harry is in trouble when he unwittingly helps an escaped convict to obtain a new identity.

programme.title: Isle of Man TT
programme.desc: Action from the RST Superbike TT. Best bits from the big-bike race, where power and endurance collide on the Mountain Course.

programme.title: The Protectors
programme.desc: Adventure series about a European crime-fighting team. Paul has been kidnapped and will be blown to bits unless Harry and the Contessa help steal jewels which they have been hired to safeguard.

programme.title: Battlebots
programme.desc: US robot combat series. There are shocks and spills in a metal-crunching fight card of champions and challengers as Ripperoni - the world's only pizza bot - tries to slice through former world champion End Game from New Zealand, plus a Main Event for the ages between Giant Nut holders Tantrum and the formidable flipper Hydra in the most anticipated fight of the season due to their last match being controversial to say the least.

programme.title: Magnum P.I.
programme.desc: Classic US action drama series. A fitness trainer offers to knock Thomas into shape in time for an ironman contest in return for finding her missing fiance.

programme.title: Magnum P.I.
programme.desc: Classic US action drama series. Violent Texan Billy Joe Bob comes to Hawaii to hire the investigator to find his sister, but Thomas has his hands full trying to keep Billy Joe Bob from beating up every local who gets in their way and trying to find his sister Carol Ann, who has gotten in over her head with the wrong crowd.

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Tough 1970s police drama series. Carter discovers that an informant was involved in the shooting of a colleague, and Regan finds himself distracted from the pursuit of a dangerous armed criminal by the disturbed wife of DCI Haskins.

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series. When Arthur allows himself to be persuaded into retirement, Ray is quick to take control of Daley Enterprises - however, Arthur finds that a life of leisure isn't to his taste and Ray soon finds his hands full without that Arthurian magic.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: US documentary series following salvage experts Mike Wolff and Frank Fritz as they travel around America and the rest of the globe trawling junkyards, garages, attics and barns for precious objects. Mike and Frank find little of value on a farm but hope to buy something worthwhile from a demolition expert and an oil can collector.

programme.title: The Motorbike Show
programme.desc: Henry Cole explores more UK rides and gives more tired bikes some much-needed attention in his workshop with the help of Allen Millyard - in this episode, Britain's favourite biker tours Dorset's Jurassic Coast, uncovers the surprising history of Lawrence of Arabia and his love for Brough Superior motorbikes, and meets Britain's biggest women's motorbike club in the form of the Curvy Riders.

programme.title: No Room For Error
programme.desc: The island is drenched in sun and there's a crackle of anticipation as the cream of the road racing crop eagerly await a TT like none before - there are newcomer nerves alongside shock and awe as Michael Dunlop leaves jaws on the floor with a stunning opening lap to set the tone for a record-breaking fortnight at the 2023 event.

programme.title: Die Another Day
programme.desc: The 20th entry in the James Bond film series and Pierce Brosnan's final appearance as the secret agent. 007 is assigned to North Korea on a mission to assassinate a colonel when he is betrayed by a double agent at MI6 and captured - after enduring 14 months of torture, James is traded at the Korean border for Zao, a North Korean agent and associate of the colonel, in a prisoner exchange. Bond then escapes his subsequent MI6 detention and tracks Zao to Havana where he meets NSA agent Jinx and learns that she is working on the same case - James soon discovers that Zao is in league with the British diamond and technology tycoon Sir Gustav Graves... and that the two are planning to use a new satellite called Icarus to change the power balance of the world permanently.
